dct_title_s: Palæstinæ sive Terræ Promissionis in duodecium tribus partitæ facies vetus : secundum monumenta veterum et observationes recentiorum digesta
dct_alternative_sm: Palæstinæ sive Terræ Promissionis in duodecium tribus partitæ facies vetus
dct_description_sm: accurante Jo. Blair ; I. Bayly sculp.
Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian.
Shows topography, drainage, boundaries, kingdoms, places of historical interest.
Appears in Blair's The chronology and history of the world. London : 1768.
